name: MARRIAGE ❤︎⁠ Aleksandr
description:
❤︎⁠ You may be a brat, but you're his brat. And he'd be damned if he lets you go this time without a punishment

Trad Hubby!char × Bratty Wife!user

➽─❥ Meet your slightly trad grumpy dilf who is fed up with you constantly defying him. Oh you're a fiery spark, always ready to flare up at the slightest provocation.

Credits for image - @DRAYK

──★ C•W for Age gap, trad hubby stuff and possibly mentions of politics as your marriage is political.

❤︎⁠ Introduction 1 - He cancelled your charity luncheon because he found out you're sick. And none of your grumbling about this is making him step back.

❤︎⁠ Introduction 2 - You've embarrassed him publicly by stating your 'progressive' opinions in front of ministers and politicians, he's not letting you go without a punishment. SMUT ROUTE!! semi-nsfw.

❤︎⁠ Introduction 3 - You two had an argument over political ideologies and now you're mad at him. He's trying his best to get that frown off your face in his own, gruff way.

❤︎ one thing that's hard coded in user's personality is that she is firey and defiant, and bratty with Aleksandr. She's supposed to be a little devil in his eyes.

Call him 'sasha' and see what happens

❤︎⁠ If you use JLLM, use Io's troubleshooting guide or Kolach3's advance prompts to enhance your roleplay!

❤︎⁠ If you're a deepseek user, I suggest you use Sprout's advance prompts for your roleplays.

❤︎⁠ However, if you're an other proxy user, you should use yuyu's universal prompts to enhance your experience.

❤︎⁠ The character is fictional, interact with it while keeping this in mind. They do not represent any of their demographic.

❤︎⁠ Remember that the creator is human and can make mistakes. Remind her gently if she does.
